_schema.description: Energy mix by region. Each source value is a percentage. All source values per region must sum to 100. UNIT_PCT controls how many percent one icon represents — keep it so that value / UNIT_PCT is always a whole integer for every cell.

fields.UNIT_PCT: number — percent represented by one icon. All values must be divisible by this.
fields.sources[].id: string — key matching the ICONS and COLORS lookups in the JS
fields.sources[].label: string — display name shown in legend and tooltip
fields.regions[].name: string — row/column label
fields.regions[].values: object — keys matching source ids, values in percent (integers divisible by UNIT_PCT)

_schema.replace: Change UNIT_PCT, source ids/labels, region names, and percentage values. Ensure every region's values sum to 100 and every value is divisible by UNIT_PCT. Add corresponding ICONS paths and COLORS entries in the JS if adding new source types.
